resumo: English appears in many digital contexts, such as posts, videos, comments and news.
Critical reading helps students identify information, opinion and purpose in online texts.
This topic connects language learning with digital life and responsible interpretation.

explicacao.texto: Students often encounter English in online environments. Reading digital texts involves understanding vocabulary, recognizing the type of message and identifying what the author wants to communicate.
explicacao.dica: Look at titles, keywords and repeated expressions to identify the main message of a text.

explicacao.texto: Reading critically means going beyond isolated words. It includes analyzing reliability, intention, point of view and the possible impact of digital messages in everyday life.
explicacao.dica: Ask who wrote the message, why it was written and whether the information seems trustworthy.

exemplos.enunciado: Read a short online post in English about environmental action at school.
passos: Identify the main idea of the post.
Observe whether the author is informing or expressing an opinion.
Reflect on the purpose of the message.
exemplos.resposta: This example shows how English reading in digital life also requires interpretation and critical attention.

alternativas: analyze information and purpose in a text
ignore the meaning of the message
focus only on isolated letters
avoid interpretation
exercicios.respostaCorreta: analyze information and purpose in a text
exercicios.explicacao: Critical reading involves understanding what a text says and why it was produced.

exercicios.enunciado: English in digital life may appear in:
alternativas: posts, comments and online news
only mathematics notebooks
just geography maps
only science formulas
exercicios.explicacao: Digital environments expose students to many English-language texts and messages.

alternativas: Reading online texts critically helps students interpret information more responsibly.
Digital texts should be read without attention to purpose.
Every online text is automatically reliable.
English in digital media has no relevance for language learning.
exercicios.respostaCorreta: Reading online texts critically helps students interpret information more responsibly.
exercicios.explicacao: The topic connects language learning with careful analysis of digital communication.

alternativas: connect English reading to online communication and interpretation
avoid digital texts completely
ignore author intention in messages
treat every text as neutral and identical
exercicios.respostaCorreta: connect English reading to online communication and interpretation
exercicios.explicacao: The content strengthens reading skills in meaningful and current contexts.
